task_completion.description: Open Thunderbird and access the Inbox containing the expense report emails.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The Thunderbird application is open, the Inbox folder is selected, and expense report emails are visible in the message list.

task_completion.description: Open a text editor or spreadsheet application to compile the CSV.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A GUI application such as Text Editor, LibreOffice Calc, or similar is open on the screen.

task_completion.description: Create the required headers in the CSV file.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The headers 'Name', 'Department', and 'Total' (comma-separated or in separate spreadsheet columns) are visible in the first row of the document.

task_completion.description: Extract the Name, Department, and Total from all 5 expense report emails.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Exactly 5 rows of data (excluding the header) containing names, departments, and amounts are visible in the document or spreadsheet.

task_completion.description: Ensure the Total values are recorded as numeric values without currency symbols.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The values in the 'Total' column or third comma-separated position consist only of numbers and decimal points (e.g., '150.00'), with no currency symbols like '$' or '€'.

task_completion.description: Save the compiled information as a CSV file at ~/Documents/expense_summary.csv.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A 'Save As' dialog shows the filename 'expense_summary.csv' being saved in the 'Documents' folder, or a file manager window shows the saved file in the correct directory.

integrity.description: The agent used the Thunderbird GUI to read the emails.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show the agent clicking through emails in the Thunderbird application, rather than reading raw mail files via terminal commands.

integrity.description: The agent used a GUI application to create the CSV file.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show the agent typing or pasting data into a text editor or spreadsheet application, rather than using terminal commands like 'echo' or 'cat' to generate the file.

integrity.description: The agent extracted the data manually rather than using a pre-written script.
integrity.visual_evidence: No terminal windows are shown executing Python, bash, or other scripts to automatically parse the mailbox and generate the CSV.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The expected output file must be located exactly at '/home/ga/Documents/expense_summary.csv'. The file must contain exactly three headers: 'Name', 'Department', and 'Total'. There should be exactly 5 rows of extracted data corresponding to the 5 synthetic expense report emails injected into the Thunderbird Inbox. All values in the 'Total' column must be strictly numeric, containing no currency symbols.
